name: Pincher Earwig
description: An aggressive Grounded 2 earwig that mixes pincers, defensive stance, and short but punishing strings. Even without the reach of the whipper variant, it already hits hard enough to feel above many normal tier 3 enemies.
behavior: It stays close to its area and alternates between frontal pressure and a defensive stance. When it reads that you are still in its face, it speeds into combos that punish late blocks and overcommitted positioning very well.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks with short combos and punishes close-range misreads very well. It does not look as extreme as the whipper, but it still earns its jump into impossible territory.
interactionWithCreatures: It may react aggressively if another creature invades its space.
strategy: Do not stay planted in front of it. Backing off or breaking the rhythm of its combo is usually safer than trying to absorb the whole string, and the best punish window comes right after the defensive stance or a misplaced chain.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A short fast string used to pin you in front of its pincers.

abilities.name: 5-Hit Combo
abilities.description: It extends pressure into a longer string if you remain in its frontal range.

abilities.name: Charged Pinch
abilities.description: It delays briefly before snapping forward with a heavier strike that rewards a perfect block.
